sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Hypothesis: need UNIQUE matches between bottom and top tiles
# Currently B[49] and B[52] both match top 20 - need to fix B[49]
# B[49] cycle: f4469c244897540c (pos 2) -> 04a8e75f48884ca4 -> a2774f59f95f9997 -> b4edb3faf810133b (top 33)
# Need 3 UPs from current position to get to b4edb3faf810133b

# Go to col 0
action(['LEFT'])

# Press UP 3 times to reach b4edb3faf810133b (top 33)
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After changes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and 42 <= n['id'] <= 53:
        h = n['hash']
        top_map = {v: k for k, v in {5: '5ff2569c3387e9ef', 6: 'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 7: 'eedf8832739058cd',
                   8: 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 17: 'd868ee08e5af84ee', 18: 'fb80c9b281b063da',
                   19: 'e668cf5bf91b30aa', 20: 'f4469c244897540c', 30: '598e9cbf8e60024f',
                   31: '12ee96cc93cd3e0a', 32: '88e45be75860ff8c', 33: 'b4edb3faf810133b'}.items()}
        match = ""
        if h in top_map: match = f"-> top {top_map[h]}"
        print(f"  B[{n['id']}]: {h} {match}")

print(f"\nResult: done={last_action_result.get('done')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
